title: Craftable Rooted Dirt
description: With this datapack, you can combine dirt and hanging roots to get rooted dirt.
body:
# Craftable Rooted Dirt

Adds a crafting recipe for rooted dirt!

<details>
<summary>Recipe</summary>

</details>
